fail.allowed_action_policy: retain accepted full r5, keep RB-3 open, preserve the frozen predecessor family, and correct only bounded successor projection, stripping, family assembly, or qualification defects; user-built wheel repair remains out of scope and 16 KiB remains a hard gate

input_routing.fallback: retain accepted full r5 and the frozen predecessor family, return one complete fail-closed receipt, and correct only a bounded install-only projection, qualification, audit, or receipt defect without user-wheel repair
input_routing.first_attempt: acquire the exact accepted full r5 and predecessor install-only result, derive the same install_only candidate twice, repeat all Android and uv direct/managed qualification, and audit canonical raw_policy_clean/postprocessing_boundary fields
